title: erodium cyrenaicum
intro: Erodium cyrenaicum, also known as the Cyrenaian storksbill, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erodium cyrenaicum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making infusions or decoctions from its leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
